_comment: RI Canon Opportunity: Seven-Colored Daoist Confrontation. Canon event: Wang Lin kills the Seven-Colored Daoist and becomes the owner of the Cave World. Per user directive: every canon event must be accessible in-game.
name: Seven-Colored Daoist Confrontation
canon_event: Wang Lin kills the Seven-Colored Daoist and becomes the owner of the Cave World
why_untaken: Requires Heaven Trampling cultivation; the Seven-Colored Daoist is the strongest being in the Cave World.
natural_next_event: The confrontation occurs when Wang Lin reaches sufficient cultivation.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
